memberdef.name: IT8801_DT_MFD_ITEMS_FUNC
memberdef.initializer: { \ .gpiocr = IT8801_DEV_MFD(idx, inst), \ .pin = IT8801_DEV_MFD_PIN(idx, inst), \ .alt_func = IT8801_DEV_MFD_FUNC(idx, inst), \ }

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct i2c_dt_spec *i2c_dev, const struct device *dev, uint8_t pin, uint8_t func)
memberdef.name: mfd_it8801_configure_pins
